task_completion.description: Create a new 2024 tax return for Sam MacAllister in StudioTax 2024
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 interface is open with the taxpayer name 'Sam MacAllister' visible in the personal information or identification section.

task_completion.description: Enter income figures converted from USD to CAD
task_completion.visual_evidence: T2125 form (Statement of Business or Professional Activities) or income section in StudioTax showing entered income values. The VLM should look for evidence that the agent performed a currency conversion (e.g., calculator open, or CAD values differing from the raw USD source documents).

task_completion.description: Enter business expenses while filtering out personal non-deductible expenses
task_completion.visual_evidence: T2125 expense section in StudioTax showing entered deductions. The VLM should verify that personal expenses from the source summary are omitted from the tax software's deduction lines.
Form T2209 (Federal Foreign Tax Credits), provincial equivalent, or the specific foreign tax credit line in StudioTax is populated with a claimed amount.

task_completion.description: Save the completed return as 'sam_macallister.24t' in the specified directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box, StudioTax title bar, or File Explorer window confirming the file is named 'sam_macallister.24t' and saved in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the StudioTax 2024 GUI to complete the return
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the StudioTax 2024 application windows, menus, and forms, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the tax software by creating the .24t file in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The .24t file is saved via the StudioTax interface. There should be no text editors (like Notepad or VS Code) open and editing a file named 'sam_macallister.24t'.

integrity.description: Agent progressively entered data into the tax forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating through different forms (T2125, T2209) and entering data, rather than the final file just appearing in the directory without application usage.
